## Meeting Purpose

[Review client accounts, discuss challenges, and align on strategies across the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several high-priority clients (HeyGen, Smith AI, DataGrid, PromptFu) require focused attention to improve relationships and outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [New processes and tools (Linear, Slack channels) are being implemented to improve visibility and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Specialized expertise (e.g. security writers) may be needed for certain technical clients](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO and custom research/data sources are key focus areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

## Topics

### HeyGen Account Review

  - [At risk client, unhappy over last few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [New reboot strategy presented Friday with 3 tracks:](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
    1.  PSO around their toolset (AI avatars, translation, text-to-video)
    2.  Programmatic SEO for AI avatar use cases across industries
    3.  Pilot for international/translation focus (large traffic from India)
  - [Need to move quickly on execution, potentially reallocating engineering resources](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Aiming to show value through rapid iteration and testing of ideas](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

### Smith AI Account Review

### School AI Account Review

  - [Programmatic SEO focus, but execution has been slow](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [Need to develop comprehensive strategy for lesson plan content across subjects/grades](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2402.0)

### DataGrid Account Review

  - [Misalignment on expectations vs. current product/market fit stage](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=7171.0)
  - [Need unified strategy to avoid reactive work](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=7217.0)
  - [Technical implementation challenges for programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=7237.0)
  - [Action items:](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=7260.0)
    1.  Conduct customer interviews for insights and content
    2.  Develop LinkedIn strategy leveraging Tiago's expertise
    3.  Create use case library highlighting product strengths
    4.  Find ways to embed product UI into content

### PromptFu Account Review

  - [Client rewriting all delivered content due to quality/accuracy concerns](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=9043.0)
  - [Need for more technical accuracy and industry-specific language](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=9064.0)
  - [Exploring options:](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=9057.0)
    1.  Adjust input sources and research process
    2.  Improve tone/style guidelines
    3.  Potentially hire security expert editor/reviewer

### Pixis Account Review

  - [New head of content, initial skepticism but recent alignment](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=10580.0)

  - [Opportunity to leverage Jason's (CEO) content creation enthusiasm](https://fathom.video/share/bxfkQzMhV1gXuAnunszAwnryubjV8A4Q?tab=summary&timestamp=10651.0)
